name: Jacek Stachursky
description:
🎤✨ STACHURSKY – 30 YEARS ON STAGE | ANNIVERSARY TOUR 2026/2027 ✨🎤

30 cities. 30 years. One unforgettable celebration.

Join us for the official 30th Anniversary Tour of Jacek Stachursky, one of Poland’s most iconic and beloved recording artists.
Following the overwhelming success of the first leg of the anniversary tour, Stachursky returns to the road for an even bigger celebration, performing across 30 cities throughout the UK and Europe between October 2026 and February 2027.

For over three decades, Stachursky has been captivating audiences with his unmistakable voice, chart-topping hits, and electrifying stage presence. His music has become part of the soundtrack of generations, earning him numerous awards, gold and platinum records, and a loyal fanbase that continues to grow year after year.

This special anniversary show will take fans on a journey through 30 years of music, featuring the biggest hits that made him a household name, alongside brand-new material from his upcoming album, set for release in December 2026.

As part of the tour, several cities that hosted sold-out anniversary concerts earlier in 2026 will welcome Stachursky back for exclusive encore performances in February 2027. These special shows will feature songs from the new album, refreshed production, and an expanded concert experience, giving fans a unique opportunity to celebrate this milestone once again.
Expect an evening filled with nostalgia, unforgettable melodies, powerful emotions, and the incredible energy that has defined Stachursky's live performances for over 30 years.

📍 Oslo, Norway
📅 15/11/2026
🕖 Doors Open: 18:30
🎟 Tickets are released in limited pricing tiers. 
The earliest ticket allocation offers the lowest prices, with ticket prices increasing as each tier sells out.
Don't miss your chance to be part of this historic celebration and experience the music, memories, and energy that have made Stachursky one of Poland's most enduring artists.

🔥 Celebrate 30 years of Stachursky live! 🔥
